title: rosa villosa var. cinerascens
intro: Rosa villosa var. cinerascens, also known as the hairy rose or fragrant rose, is a plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa villosa var. cinerascens include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of various digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
